3307580.name: Neon Sliders
3307580.description:
Neon Sliders is a free-roam 80s future racing game that feels like a mix of Need for Speed Underground 2, Burnout 3, Crazy Taxi, and Pod Racing in a synth jam.

You are a fresh member of the Neon Sliders, a rogue street racing gang in Neon City. Roam the city, find races, and compete. Winning for the Neon Sliders helps the gang secure rep and gain access to other sections of the city, but also secures you some new Pods and Mods.

Collect Pods and Customize them with new body parts, thrusters, trails, hoverglow, paint, chips, hacks, and more. Compete on the leaderboards with your custom Pods for extra street cred.
3307580.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
